description_long: This is an adult woman standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides, wearing a fitted, long-sleeved dress with a flared skirt. The dress features a bold animal print pattern and reaches above the knees. She is wearing high-heeled shoes, with each shoe appearing to be a different color. Her hair is styled in a neat, low bun at the back of her head, and her facial features are clearly defined. The figure has a slender build and a confident, composed posture. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A standing adult woman in a long-sleeved, animal print dress with high heels and a low bun hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full dress, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the curve of the dress, and the bun hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, the bun, and the heels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, the dress's fit, and the posture of the arms and legs.
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
